Fix SRC-BUG-005 (attempt 1/3): QA: REQ-002 — The requirement REQ-002 'Localhost Binding Securit.

Acceptance test gap for REQ-002: Localhost Binding Security

Reason: The requirement REQ-002 'Localhost Binding Security' is not implemented at all. The provided code contains only version definitions, CLI entry point setup, and empty package init files. There is no configuration, logic, or code that restricts binding to localhost (e.g., setting host='127.0.0.1' or 'localhost'), no server startup code, no network binding configuration, and no security controls related to localhost-only access.

Severity: high

ACTION: Implement REQ-002 according to the spec.

PROJECT: /Users/dmitry/Documents/Droid/spec-editor2
Read FILES TO CHECK mentioned above before making changes.
Use bash to run: python -m pytest tests/ -q to verify fixes.
